rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §12.021 governs adoption of home-rule school district charters and charter amendments by voter election. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 12.021. ADOPTION OF CHARTER OR CHARTER AMENDMENT.
_note: Rule text concerns school district charter adoption procedure; no operative connection to homestead exemption valuation.
